creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text: I don't even see how ${RUNDECK_HOME} can be used.  The default is 1 level deep, but what if ${RUNDECK_HOME} was set to "alpha/beta/gamma/delta" ?  the @dirrmtry would have to be variable depending on the depth.  This is not supported until @dirrm /@dirrmtry are obsolete.  (which is not yet the case)
